Python 3.10 documentation snippet:
"The math.isclose() function returns True if the values a and b are close to each other and False otherwise. The determination of whether two values are considered close is based on absolute and relative tolerances."

MDN Web Docs - Array.prototype.reduce():
The reduce() method executes a user-supplied 'reducer' callback function on each element of the array, in order, passing in the return value from the calculation on the preceding element.

Git Doc: 'git checkout'
Updates files in the working tree to match the version in the index or the specified tree. If no paths are given, git checkout will also update HEAD to set the specified branch as the active branch.

Standard Library documentation for C++ vector push_back:
Appends a new element to the end of the container. The new element is initialized as a copy of the argument. If the new size exceeds capacity, all iterators are invalidated.

Docker CLI Reference Guide:
The 'docker run' command first creates a writeable container layer over the specified image, and then starts it using the specified command.

Rust Book Excerpt - Ownership Rules:
1. Each value in Rust has an owner.
2. There can only be one owner at a time.
3. When the owner goes out of scope, the value will be dropped.

Nginx Official Documentation - Reverse Proxy:
To pass a request to an HTTP proxied server, the proxy_pass directive is specified inside a location block.

HTTP/1.1 Status Code Definitions:
404 Not Found: The server has not found anything matching the Request-URI. No indication is given of whether the condition is temporary or permanent.

Kubernetes Docs - Pod Overview:
A Pod is the smallest execution unit in Kubernetes. A Pod encapsulates one or more applications, storage resources, and a unique network IP.

JSON Schema Specification Summary:
JSON Schema is a vocabulary that allows you to annotate and validate JSON documents. It defines the media type application/schema+json.

Bash reference manual for commands expansion:
Expansion is performed on the command line after it has been split into tokens. There are seven kinds of expansion performed.

React API Reference - useEffect Hook:
useEffect is a React Hook that lets you synchronize a component with an external system. Pass an array of dependencies as the second argument.

Redis Documentation: 'GET key'
Get the value of key. If the key does not exist the special value nil is returned. An error is returned if the value stored at key is not a string.

```python
# Standard quicksort implementation in Python
def quicksort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1:
        return arr
    pivot = arr[len(arr) // 2]
    left = [x for x in arr if x < pivot]
    middle = [x for x in arr if x == pivot]
    right = [x for x in arr if x > pivot]
    return quicksort(left) + middle + quicksort(right)
```

```sql
-- Query to count occurrences of active statuses in table
SELECT status, COUNT(*) 
FROM tasks 
GROUP BY status;
```
